mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.tag_name as tagName, COUNT(tw.work_id) as workCount FROM tags t LEFT JOIN tag_work tw ON t.id = tw.tag_id GROUP BY t.id, t.tag_name ORDER BY workCount DESC

SELECT t.id, t.tag_name AS tagName, COUNT(tw.work_id) AS workCount FROM tags t LEFT JOIN tag_work tw ON t.id = tw.tag_id WHERE t.tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') GROUP BY t.id, t.tag_name ORDER BY workCount DESC LIMIT 20
